notes: Refined the planning date to Sunday 20 September {{year}} so the estimate matches the Algeria Sunday school-return pattern instead of a Monday date.
Reinforced the answer-first copy to distinguish clearly between the planning estimate and the still-unannounced official date.
Added practical parent guidance tied to first-year primary registration, the 13 June {{year}} extension, and the 30 June {{year}} results window.
Focused validation passed with validate-holiday-content, ESLint, typecheck, and seo:validate.
Generated holiday bundles were not regenerated because events:build was intentionally not run, so the rendered route can still lag behind the authored package.
